headline: United (UAL) Joins Push For $20 Billion Air Traffic Control Upgrade
summary: United Airlines Holdings and other major aviation companies are urging Congress to approve a $20b package to modernize U.S. air traffic control systems. The proposed funding targets upgrades to critical infrastructure that manages flight routing, congestion, and safety across the national airspace. This coordinated push places United alongside Boeing and Airbus in a broad industry effort to influence upcoming federal transportation priorities. United Airlines Holdings, traded as...

headline: Delta vs. United: Which Airline Is Better Built for Higher Fuel Costs?
summary: Delta and United both saw earnings and margins hit by higher jet fuel costs this quarter, but Delta's refinery and hedging gains helped it outperform United's liquidity-based approach.

headline: United Airlines Warns Fuel Spike Could Add $6 Billion to 2026 Costs
summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. stock fell in premarket trading Thursday after the carrier warned that higher fuel costs and capacity constraints are expected to weigh on near-term results, even as it reported second-quarter earnings and revenue above Wall Street estimates....
